title: Stage 1 Capabilities
description: The Controlled Public Beta feature set focuses on login, trial or payment, Remnawave provisioning, config delivery, support recovery, and monitored operations.

quantum.title: S1 Protocol Baseline
quantum.subtitle: VLESS Reality RAW + XHTTP
quantum.description: Stage 1 keeps the VPN transport surface narrow: VLESS Reality RAW is the default profile and VLESS Reality XHTTP is the alternate path after evidence.
specs: Out of S1: Helix, Verta, Beep production

multihop.title: Evidence-Gated Regions
multihop.subtitle: Country-level startup inventory
multihop.description: Regions are not public promises until staging or production node evidence exists. The S1 catalogue starts with country-level slots and hides unavailable nodes.

obfuscation.title: DPI-Resistant Profiles
obfuscation.subtitle: No universal unblock promise
obfuscation.description: Reality-based profiles are designed for restricted networks, but S1 copy stays bounded: performance and access depend on the user's network and current node evidence.

killswitch.title: Support Recovery Path
killswitch.subtitle: Payment and provisioning safeguards
killswitch.description: The S1 product surface prioritizes recoverability: paid-but-no-access cases, provisioning failures, expired access, and support escalation have explicit handling.

items.title: Bounded Privacy Copy
items.desc: CyberVPN does not make an absolute privacy claim in S1. Operational metadata may exist for security, billing, support, and provisioning.

items.title: Plan-Based Device Limits
items.desc: Device counts depend on the selected plan and must be enforced by the backend and support process.

items.title: Manual Renewal First
items.desc: S1 does not promise automatic renewal. Renewal reminders and invoice links are allowed only after evidence.

items.title: P2P Restricted by Default
items.desc: Torrent/P2P access is not advertised as broadly available. Node policy and provider rules control what is enabled.
